  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Rubeus.exe is a known credential access tool. It was launched with arguments to request a Kerberos TGT using an NTLM hash and create a netonly process, indicating credential theft and potential lateral movement.",

    "/rc4",
    "NTLM hash",

    "credential theft",
